---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for MCE
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: DexopT
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.

*Example: "When tool responses contain deeply nested JSON, the pruner doesn't flatten them..."*

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this to work.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried.

## Which MCE Component?

- [ ] Squeeze Engine (Pruner / Semantic / Synthesizer)
- [ ] Token Economist
- [ ] Policy Engine
- [ ] Circuit Breaker
- [ ] Lazy Registrar
- [ ] Semantic Cache
- [ ] MCP Client / Proxy
- [ ] TUI Dashboard
- [ ] Configuration
- [ ] Other

## Additional Context

Any other details, mockups, or examples.
